professionalSummary: Software engineer with 17+ years of experience progressing from individual contributor to engineering leader. Currently managing cross-functional teams and building scalable e-commerce platform features. Strong background in full-stack development with expertise in Node.js, TypeScript, Go, and modern frontend frameworks. Proven track record of stabilizing legacy systems, leading technical migrations, and delivering high-impact platform features for marketplace and e-commerce businesses.
careerHighlights: Engineering Manager at Carousell leading a 6-engineer cross-functional team supporting trust, safety, and platform infrastructure initiatives
Technical Architect at SoBanHang leading frontend engineering for Vietnam's fast-growing e-commerce marketplace
Led migration of inventory-sync services from acquired startup into Carousell's infrastructure, publishing the official Shopify App for merchant integration
Stabilized multiple legacy codebases inherited from departing teams, restoring development velocity and system reliability
Built enterprise backend framework at FPT enabling rapid feature development across web and desktop applications for financial institutions
Delivered solutions for major Vietnamese financial organizations including Hanoi Stock Exchange and State Bank of Vietnam

roles.title: Engineering Manager
highlights: Managed cross-functional team of 6 engineers across QA, Backend, Web, iOS, and Android
Led development of platform features including order post-processing workflows
Contributed to Trust and Safety initiatives for fraud prevention and malicious behavior detection
Built backend services in Golang and maintained legacy Python services
Implemented microservice and event-driven architectures for scalable trust-processing systems

roles.title: Senior Software Engineer
highlights: Owned the inventory-sync backend platform integrating Carousell sellers with Shopify

Published and integrated the official Carousell Shopify App as frontend interface for inventory-sync capabilities

highlights: Led frontend engineering for OxStreet.com, a sneaker marketplace acquired by Carousell
